src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone significant changes, with many scenes beyond the imagination of the best screenwriters. In last year's annual report, I highlighted that the performance of the financial markets in 2017 was "beyond expectations," while also noting that "hidden risks" lurked in the outlook. Reflecting on 2018, it could perhaps be described as "joy followed by sorrow." Shortly after several global stock indices hit record highs in January, the overheated investment sentiment was quickly met with the cold edge of US-China trade frictions. Coupled with ongoing Brexit negotiations, deteriorating geopolitical tensions, and four Federal Reserve interest rate hikes, market optimism sharply reversed, and asset prices fell sharply within the year. The MSCI Global Index fell 20.3% from its high to low, with an annual decline of about 10%, making it the worst year since the global financial crisis in 2008. The Hang Seng Index once declined by as much as 26.7% from its peak, ending the year down 13.6%, recording its largest annual drop in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite unpredictable external fluctuations, Hong Kong’s financial system remained resilient, with smooth functioning of the monetary markets. The thirty-five-year-old Linked Exchange Rate System successfully met the challenges of capital outflows from the Hong Kong dollar. Since the outbreak of the global financial crisis, there has been approximately HKD 1 trillion in capital inflows into the Hong Kong dollar. Last year, with rising US interest rates, the Hong Kong-US interest rate differential continued to widen, prompting increased carry trades of "selling HKD and buying USD." The HKD/USD exchange rate weakened at the beginning of the year; since the first trigger of the "Weakening Exchange Rate Guarantee" established in 2005 in April, it was triggered 26 more times during the year. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) duly fulfilled the "buy Hong Kong dollars, sell US dollars" guarantee in an orderly and transparent manner, absorbing HKD 103.5 billion of Hong Kong dollar sale orders. As capital outflows persisted, the one-month HIBOR increased by 105 basis points over the year, and following the US rate hike in September, banks raised their best lending rates. The HKMA repeatedly and timely explained the operation of the "Weakening Exchange Rate Guarantee" through various channels, helping the public understand that capital outflows are a normal part of interest rate normalization and the proper functioning of the Linked Exchange Rate system. At the end of last year, the International Monetary Fund reiterated its support for Hong Kong's Linked Exchange Rate system, and the SAR government also emphasized that the system is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary stability. These measures help maintain public confidence in the linked exchange rate.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The global financial crisis in 2008 revealed numerous hidden flaws and risks within the international financial system, prompting coordinated reforms over the past decade targeting financial markets and institutions, including enhanced corporate governance and risk management in banking supervision. The HKMA’s banking supervision focuses on two areas: prudential oversight of banks’ asset-liability risks and the integrity of banks’ conduct. Both are equally important. In asset-liability risk management, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board, the HKMA is responsible for implementing international standards to ensure the prudent operation of Hong Kong’s banking sector. At the end of last year, Hong Kong’s banking capital adequacy ratio reached 20.3%, significantly higher than the minimum international standard of 8% and well above the 14.7% level during the global financial crisis. The average liquidity coverage ratio of major banks in the fourth quarter was 167.6%, far exceeding the statutory minimum of 90%. Meanwhile, to avoid repeating the crisis where taxpayer funds were used to rescue "too big to fail" institutions, the Financial Stability Board established international standards for the resolution mechanisms of financial institutions. Hong Kong is among the few Asian regions to fully implement these standards, with the HKMA’s Resolution Office actively developing detailed operational guidelines to ensure effective implementation of resolution plans, including the recent introduction of the "Loss Absorbency Requirement." Future regulations are also planned.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Given the continuous rise in property prices, the HKMA adopted pre-emptive measures from 2009 to 2017, with eight rounds of countercyclical policies, to ensure the resilience of the banking sector against potential market reversals. These measures have proved effective: the average mortgage loan-to-value ratio for new residential properties declined from 64% in 2009 to 46% at the end of 2018; the average debt-service-to-income ratio decreased from 41% in 2010 to 34% at year-end. Bank credit experienced a modest annual growth of 4.4%, with overall asset quality remaining good; retail banking’s non-performing loan ratio further declined to 0.5%, well below international and historical averages. Last year, banking profitability continued to grow, with overall return on equity rising for the second consecutive year to 13%; many international banking groups operating in Hong Kong delivered excellent results, becoming a key pillar of their group profitability.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: In terms of regulatory conduct, the HKMA established the Banking Conduct Department in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers and strengthen consumer protection. To address both symptoms and root causes, in addition to setting out various regulatory requirements on core banking conduct, recent years have seen a strong push for cultural reform within the banking sector, encouraging banks to implement a culture of integrity and service through governance, reward systems, and assessment and feedback mechanisms. The goal is for internal practices to set an example from top to bottom, fundamentally restoring and enhancing customer trust and respect. After the HKMA provided specific guidance to banks across Hong Kong in 2017, at the end of 2018 the HKMA further introduced supervisory measures on banking culture, including requiring banks to conduct self-assessments on corporate culture and related measures, ensuring the effective implementation of the three pillars of a culture of integrity and service.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Although internet and mobile banking are global trends, the HKMA continued to promote financial inclusion last year, serving communities less able to adopt new technologies. For instance, we collaborated with the Hong Kong Association of Banks to introduce a "DigiBank" service at convenience stores, allowing seniors to withdraw cash without shopping. The convenience store network has expanded to over 300 locations; we also coordinated with Hong Kong Post to launch senior-friendly ATM services at seven main post offices in Outlying Islands and the New Territories. In response to the HKMA’s recommendations, banks actively increased accessible facilities during the year, providing inclusive banking services—for example, the number of ATMs with voice navigation increased more than tenfold to over 700. Additionally, under the HKMA's vigorous promotion, we expect more banks to open additional branches and mobile banking services in remote areas, making banking more accessible for citizens.

src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The HKMA has collaborated closely with banks and the tech industry to launch the "Smart Banking Era" in September 2017, promoting financial technology development and innovation in Hong Kong, delivering a new experience in payments and banking services. A key development in 2018 was the official launch of "FPS" (Faster Payment System) in September. This is a unique real-time retail payment system globally, breaking down barriers between various e-wallets and bank accounts in Hong Kong, allowing citizens to enjoy 24/7 real-time transfers in HKD and RMB. The HKMA also introduced the world’s first "Shared QR Code" standard and app, enabling merchants to use a single QR code to connect with multiple e-payment platforms. Since launch, FPS has been very popular, with over 2.58 million registered users and an average daily transaction volume of 60,000, with average amounts of HKD 20,700 and RMB 38,000 per transaction.

src_raw: 去年5月，金管局發出虛擬銀行的認可指引，隨即有33家機構提交虛擬銀行牌照的申請。截至今年四月中，四個牌照已經發出，預期它們將於年內正式投入營運。虛擬銀行有助推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為個人和中小企提供嶄新服務和體驗，並促進普及金融。
mt_raw: In May last year, the HKMA issued guidelines for virtual banking licenses, leading to 33 applications from different institutions. As of mid-April this year, four licenses have been issued, with expected full operation within the year. Virtual banks will help drive financial technology development and innovation in Hong Kong, offering new services and experiences for individuals and SMEs, and promoting financial inclusion.

src_raw: 此外，金管局在7月發布開放應用程式介面(OpenAPI)框架，銀行將分四階段開放產品和服務的對外接口，開創更靈活、更開放的金融科技環境，讓銀行客戶更便捷地整合帳戶資料、獲取資訊，選取貼合自己需要的服務。年內，共有42項新科技產品使用金管局的金融科技監管沙盒進行測試，當中28項完成試行，有關產品和服務已順利推出市場。
mt_raw: Moreover, in July, the HKMA released an OpenAPI framework, enabling banks to gradually open up their products and services in four phases. This creates a more flexible and open fintech environment, allowing customers easier access to integrate account information, obtain data, and select services aligned with their needs. During the year, 42 new tech products were tested within the HKMA’s fintech sandbox, with 28 completing testing and successfully launching on the market.

mt_raw: The HKMA, together with several banks, launched "TradeConnect" in October last year. Using distributed ledger technology (DLT), this trade financing platform aims to improve the efficiency of trade finance approval processes. "TradeConnect" is currently testing connections with relevant platforms in other regions to facilitate cross-border trade financing activities.

src_raw: 金融科技不但廣泛應用於日常生活，近年更走進合規和監管領域。金管局鼓勵銀行運用合規科技(Regtech)協助處理日常營運如監察涉嫌洗錢和恐怖分子資金籌集的可疑活動。與此同時金管局正研究使用監管科技(Suptech)，進一步提升監管工作的效率和成效。
mt_raw: Fintech is not only widely applied in daily life but is also increasingly used in compliance and regulatory fields. The HKMA encourages banks to utilize RegTech to assist in daily operations, such as monitoring suspicious activities related to money laundering and terrorist financing. Meanwhile, the HKMA is exploring the application of SupTech (supervisory technology) to further improve the efficiency and effectiveness of regulatory work.

mt_raw: International financial centers compete in soft power. We must continually adapt to economic, social, and technological changes, grasp opportunities, and develop new growth spaces for Hong Kong’s financial industry. Green finance presents a major opportunity for Hong Kong to expand its bond and project financing markets. The HKMA supports and cooperates with the SAR government in developing green finance. Besides coordinating the SAR’s HKD 100 billion green bond issuance program, we held multiple green finance seminars last year, including two major international conferences, to enhance market awareness, understanding, and participation in green finance. We also encourage issuers to participate in the government’s green bond support scheme and Hong Kong’s green finance certification services. Last year, green bonds issued in Hong Kong exceeded USD 11 billion, over three times the size in 2017.

src_raw: 近年來投資界對基建和相關項目興趣日濃。金管局於2016年成立基建融資促進辦公室(IFFO)，合作夥伴至今已倍增至95家機構，成為區內基建融資的重要交流平台。去年金管局與國務院國有資產監督管理委員會（國資委）首次合辦高層圓桌會議，討論香港為中央國有企業「走出去」的獨特優勢和作用，為央企與香港金融、專業服務界日後共拓發展機遇奠下良好基礎。
mt_raw: Recently, investment interests in infrastructure and related projects have grown significantly. The HKMA established the Infrastructure Financing Facilitation Office (IFFO) in 2016, which has expanded its partners to 95 institutions, becoming an important platform for infrastructure financing dialogue in the region. Last year, the HKMA and the State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission of China (SASAC) jointly held a high-level roundtable for the first time, discussing Hong Kong’s unique advantages and roles in supporting central SOEs’ "going global," laying a solid foundation for future collaborations between central enterprises and Hong Kong’s financial and professional services sectors.

src_raw:
財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
With the support of the Financial Secretary and the Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau, the Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury is responsible for maintaining the stability of Hong Kong’s financial system and promoting the city’s status as an international financial center. To implement these policies, the HKMA’s responsibilities include:
- Promoting the overall stability and effective operation of the banking system
- Collaborating with relevant institutions and organizations to develop debt markets
- Handling matters related to the issuance and circulation of legal tender and coins
- Developing and overseeing payment, settlement, and clearing systems, including operating such systems when appropriate, to ensure the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure
- Working with relevant bodies to promote confidence in Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, and implementing measures to enhance Hong Kong’s competitiveness in international financial services.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。
mt_raw:
As the HKMA’s Chief Executive is appointed by the Financial Secretary, the organization reports to the public via the Financial Secretary. Since its authority derives from legislation enacted by the Legislative Council, the HKMA is also accountable to the Legislative Council. The HKMA aims to promote public understanding of its role and goals, and to monitor issues of public concern. In executing its daily work and maintaining broad engagement with society, it adheres to policies aimed at increasing transparency and openness. These policies have two main objectives:
- To maximize the public and financial sector’s understanding of the HKMA’s work while respecting legal restrictions on confidentiality, market sensitivity, and disclosure of commercial secrets
- To ensure the HKMA stays in touch with societal trends and responds appropriately to public opinions.

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA aims for international excellence in transparency, maintaining extensive contact with the media and publishing various bilingual journals and thematic publications. Its bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) features sections on economic research, statistics, consumer information, and other topics, along with publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials. It also actively uses social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA’s information center, comprising a library and exhibitions hall, is open six days a week to the public. The HKMA also conducts public educational activities through lectures and guided tours, explaining its work, especially to students, and promoting financial literacy. Details on its media relations, publications, and educational activities can be found in the chapter on “Institutional Functions.”

src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: When the Financial Secretary exercises control over the Exchange Fund, he consults the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. This committee was established under section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance. This provision states that the Financial Secretary must consult the committee when exercising control over the fund. The Financial Secretary is the ex officio chairman of the committee, while other members (including the HKMA’s Chief Executive) are appointed personally by the Financial Secretary under the authority of the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong SAR. Members are appointed based on their professional expertise and experience, which benefits the committee’s advice and decision-making. The members’ expertise covers fields such as currency, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, commerce, and law.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong's economy further expanded, but the year-on-year growth rate gradually slowed from 4.6% in the first quarter to 1.3% in the fourth quarter (Table 1), dragging the full-year growth rate down from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The slowdown in economic expansion reflects a deceleration in domestic demand growth and the ongoing drag from net exports (Figure 1). On the domestic front, private consumption grew strongly in the first quarter, but the momentum diminished thereafter, partly due to increased uncertainties from rising trade protectionism and wealth effects from a correction in local asset prices. Due to fragile business confidence, overall investment growth also slowed. On the external side, merchandise exports remained roughly stable in the first three quarters but deteriorated significantly in the fourth quarter amid escalating US-China trade tensions. Merchandise imports also slowed due to weakened demand driven by exports. Conversely, service exports grew faster throughout the year, partly benefiting from a booming inbound tourism industry, while service imports maintained momentum owing to growth in transportation, business, and other services. Net trade turned from a surplus in 2017 to a small deficit in 2018, which weighed on the local economy.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: Mainly influenced by carry trade activities under the negative interest rate differential between HKD and USD, the HKD exchange rate against the USD generally depreciated in 2018. Notably, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered in April, May, and August, prompting the Monetary Authority to buy HKD and sell USD at the linked exchange rate of HKD 7.85 to 1 USD, as stipulated under the Linked Exchange Rate System. Under this system, the monetary base of HKD contracted, indicating a decrease in banking system liquidity, combined with market expectations of US rate hikes, which caused overall interbank interest rates in HKD to rise. As the cost of funds in the banking system increased, some banks raised their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points after the Federal Reserve increased its target federal funds rate in late September. Regarding credit, growth slowed significantly from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018, partly due to a slowdown in the domestic economy and weakening external trade performance.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressures slightly increased in 2018. Excluding the effects of one-off government relief measures, the core inflation rate rose from a low of 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, still reflecting moderate levels. The faster increase in housing rents, prompted by earlier rises in private residential rents signed, contributed significantly (Figure 2). Broader analysis indicates that growth in nominal labor costs and commercial property rents accelerated slightly, further indicating rising local cost pressures. As inflation increased in some major sources of Hong Kong’s imports, import prices also rose accordingly.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: The labour market remained resilient in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate decreased from 3.1% for the whole of 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest since 1997. Most major service sectors saw declining unemployment rates, especially in accommodation and food services. With further increases in total employment and vacancies in the private sector, overall labour demand continued to strengthen, and the labour force participation rate also edged up slightly. Under tighter labour market conditions, real wages and incomes further increased.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s stock market experienced a sharp reversal in 2018. Driven by strong upward momentum in 2017, the Hang Seng Index reached an all-time high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, concerns among investors escalated due to tightening monetary policies by major central banks, worsening US-China trade frictions, and a slowdown in local economic growth, leading to a rapid shift from optimism. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 points in October and closed the year at 25,846 points, down 13.6% from a year earlier. Nonetheless, the average daily trading volume increased from HKD 88.2 billion in 2017 to HKD 107.4 billion, while the total capital raised through initial public offerings (IPOs) surged significantly due to the listing of companies engaged in new economy and innovative technology sectors.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained buoyant in the first half of 2018 but cooled down in the second half amid worsening US-China trade tensions, correction in global stock markets, and rising local interest rates. Overall, property prices declined by 9% from their peak between July and December but still recorded a 2% increase for the full year (Figure 4). Transaction volumes in both primary and secondary markets decreased notably in the second half, with total property transactions dropping 7% to 57,247 cases compared to the previous year. Housing affordability remained tight, with price-to-income and leverage ratios at 17.0 and 75.7 respectively, both well above long-term averages. Meanwhile, non-residential property prices rose across the year but slightly retreated near the end. Overall, prices and rents continued to increase, while rental yields remained low.

src_raw: 由於全球經濟增長放緩，預期2019年香港經濟增長將會減慢。尤其外圍環境充滿挑戰，預期香港出口表現仍會受壓。本地方面，雖然失業率低企及家庭收入增加將繼續支撐私人消費，但部分由於消費信心減弱及較早前的資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應的影響，預期私人消費增長步伐會放緩。固定資本形成方面，雖然隨着房屋供應增加，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但面對經濟不明朗因素增加，企業對於資本投資可能會變得更為審慎。政府預測2019年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員的最新預測增幅則平均為2.3%。
mt_raw: Due to a slowdown in global growth, Hong Kong’s economic growth in 2019 is expected to decelerate. Particularly, the external environment faces numerous challenges, and Hong Kong’s exports are expected to remain under pressure. On the domestic front, low unemployment and rising household income are expected to support private consumption, but growth may slow due to weakened consumer confidence and the wealth effects from earlier asset price adjustments. Regarding fixed capital formation, activities should gradually expand with increased housing supply, but rising uncertainties may cause firms to adopt a more cautious approach to capital investment. The government anticipates real GDP growth of 2% to 3% in 2019, while private sector analysts’ latest forecasts average around 2.3%.

src_raw: 由於包括香港在內的全球增長放緩，外圍物價及本地成本壓力或會得到紓緩，因此預期通脹壓力在2019年仍保持溫和。近期新簽訂住宅租金回落，亦會對通脹產生壓抑作用。市場共識預測2019年整體通脹率為2.2%，政府預期基本通脹率則為2.5%。預期在經濟持續增長及訪港旅遊業維持暢旺下，勞工市場狀況會繼續偏緊。私營機構分析員預計失業率於2019年會維持於約3%的水平。
mt_raw: With global growth, including Hong Kong’s, slowing, external price pressures and domestic cost pressures are likely to ease, maintaining moderate inflation in 2019. Recently observed declines in new residential rent agreements will also help keep inflation subdued. The consensus in the market is that overall inflation will be around 2.2% in 2019, while the government’s forecast for core inflation is 2.5%. Under the continued economic growth and thriving inbound tourism industry, the labour market is expected to remain tight. Private sector analysts predict the unemployment rate will stay around 3% in 2019.

src_raw: 另外，住宅物業市場受眾多外圍及本地因素所影響，其前景並不明朗。外圍方面，中美貿易摩擦的不確定性將有可能影響市場情緒、經濟前景及金融狀況，使香港物業市場前景繼續蒙上陰影。本地方面，雖然經濟增長放緩，但就業情況及收入增長仍大致穩定，或可支持住宅物業需求。本港利率的走勢某程度上視乎美國未來的政策利率變動，惟後者走勢並不明確。長遠而言，由於過去幾年住宅落成量有所增加，加上政府致力增加土地及房屋供應，預期房屋供求缺口或會收窄。
mt_raw: Additionally, the residential property market is influenced by many external and local factors, and its outlook remains uncertain. External factors like US-China trade tensions could impact market sentiment, economic prospects, and financial conditions, casting a shadow over Hong Kong’s property outlook. Domestically, despite the slowing economic growth, stable employment and income growth may support housing demand. Hong Kong interest rates will partly depend on future US policy rate adjustments, which remain uncertain. In the long term, increased housing completions over the past years and government efforts to boost land and housing supply are expected to narrow the housing supply-demand gap.

src_raw: 2018年銀行體系繼續穩步增長，資產負債表擴大5.9%。面對經濟不明朗因素持續，例如主要經濟體之間的貿易衝突及加息等，企業在獲取新貸款方面變得較為保守。年內貸款總額增幅放緩至4.4%，而2017年為16.1%。有關增長受在香港使用的貸款（+6.5%）及在香港境外使用的貸款（+2%）同告增加帶動。另一方面，由於環球貿易環境不明朗，貿易融資下跌7.6%。中國內地相關貸款的增長亦由2017年的17.5%放緩至2018年的1.4%。
mt_raw: In 2018, the banking system continued to grow steadily, with total assets and liabilities expanding by 5.9%. Ongoing economic uncertainties, such as trade tensions and rate hikes in major economies, led to more cautious borrowing by firms. Total loans increased by 4.4% compared to 16.1% in 2017, driven by loans used domestically (+6.5%) and abroad (+2%). Meanwhile, trade financing declined by 7.6%, reflecting global trade uncertainties. Growth of loans to mainland China slowed from 17.5% in 2017 to 1.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 就負債方而言，存款總額在2018年增加5%，較2017年（+8.7%）的增幅小。由於預期美國持續加息，部分銀行上調定期存款利率，吸引存戶將往來及儲蓄存款轉為定期存款，從而鎖定資金。往來及儲蓄存款佔存款總額的比例由對上一年的57.4%，降至2018年底的51.4%，導致資金成本上升。由於存款總額的增長較貸款總額快，整體貸存比率由2017年底的73%稍降至2018年底的72.6%（圖5）。
mt_raw: On the liabilities side, total deposits increased by 5% in 2018, compared to an 8.7% increase in 2017. Anticipating continued US rate hikes, some banks raised fixed deposit rates to attract depositors and lock in funds. The share of current and savings deposits in total deposits fell from 57.4% in the previous year to 51.4% at the end of 2018, leading to higher funding costs. As the growth of total deposits lagged behind loans, the loan-to-deposit ratio slightly decreased from 73% at the end of 2017 to 72.6% at year-end (Figure 5).

The Linked Exchange Rate System is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, continuing to demonstrate its resilience against substantial shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s main monetary policy goal is to maintain currency stability, ensuring that the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate remains within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar in the foreign exchange market. The monetary system primarily employs a Currency Board arrangement, stipulating that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund support at least 100% of the monetary base; any changes in the monetary base must be matched by equivalent increases or decreases in US dollar reserves, maintaining a 100% parity.

src_raw:

- 負債證明書（為3間發鈔銀行發行的銀行紙幣提供十足支持）
- 政府發行的流通紙幣及硬幣

mt_raw:
The monetary base (Table 1) includes:
- Certificate of indebtedness (fully backing banknotes issued by three note-issuing banks)
- Circulating banknotes and coins issued by the government
- Total balances held by banks in settlement accounts with the Monetary Authority (the total reserve)
- Foreign reserves issued by the Exchange Fund on behalf of the government, in the form of certificates and bonds.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The Monetary Authority (MA) maintains exchange rate stability through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to convertibility. If market demand for the Hong Kong dollar exceeds supply, pushing the market rate towards the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking rate of 7.75 HKD per USD, the MA will sell Hong Kong dollars and buy US dollars from banks, increasing total reserves and lowering Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thus bringing the exchange rate back into the 7.75-7.85 range. Conversely, if the Hong Kong dollar is in excess supply, causing the market rate to weaken toward the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking rate of 7.85 HKD per USD, the MA will buy Hong Kong dollars from banks, reducing reserves and raising the Hong Kong dollar interest rates, restoring the exchange rate within the specified range.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Amid widening interest rate differentials between the Hong Kong dollar and US dollar, driven by carry trade activities, the Hong Kong dollar gradually depreciated throughout the year. On April 12, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered for the first time since 2005, when it was set at 7.85. Over the year, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered a total of 27 times, with 13 triggers in April, 6 in May, and 8 in August. Despite this, trading remained smooth and orderly, with the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate hovering around 7.85 from mid-April to mid-September (see Chart 1). Afterwards, the Hong Kong dollar slightly appreciated, partly reflecting the approaching holidays, quarter-end, and year-end, which tightened banking sector liquidity and led to some positions being unwound. Additionally, the market sentiment improved in early November, supporting the Hong Kong dollar. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: As the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered, reserves and the total amount of outstanding foreign currency notes and bonds issued by the Exchange Fund decreased from HKD 1,226.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 1,136.2 billion at the end of 2018 (see Chart 2). During the year, the MA purchased a total of HKD 103.5 billion from banks at the weak-side exchange rate of 7.85 HKD/USD, in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System. Reserves decreased from HKD 179.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 76.4 billion at the end of 2018. The total amount of outstanding foreign currency notes and bonds remained relatively unchanged. The monetary base remained fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Following the triggering of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking and the reduction in banking sector liquidity, combined with market expectations of US interest rate hikes, interbank interest rates in Hong Kong generally rose during 2018. Increased funding needs related to equity fundraising and seasonal liquidity demands led to higher volatility in short-term interbank rates (see Chart 3). Overall, short-term interbank rates mostly remained below baseline rates. As funding costs in the banking system rose, and after the US Federal Reserve raised its target rate range in late September, banks increased their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: In response to four US Federal Reserve rate hikes totaling 100 basis points during the year (from 1.25–1.50% to 2.25–2.50%), the base rate was adjusted four times—on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20—by a total of 100 basis points, from 1.75% to 2.75%. These adjustments follow a formula announced on March 26, 2009, setting the base rate at the lower end of the US Federal Funds target range plus 50 basis points or the 5-day moving average of overnight and 1-month Hong Kong dollar interbank rates, whichever is higher.

src_raw: 港元遠期匯率折讓在首4個月擴大，大致跟隨港元與美元息差的走勢，其中12個月港元遠期匯率點子在4月中達到負620點子（圖4）。其後隨着港元與美元的負息差收窄，港元遠期匯率折讓略為縮小，然後在第4季再度擴大。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2017年的103億港元增至2018年的402億港元。
mt_raw: The forward points discount of the Hong Kong dollar widened in the first four months of the year, roughly following the interest rate differential with the US dollar, with the 12-month forward points reaching -620 in April (see Chart 4). As the interest rate differential narrowed later in the year, the forward points discount decreased somewhat and widened again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong monetary market continued to operate normally. Discount window lending increased from HKD 10.3 billion in 2017 to HKD 40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: Since its implementation in 1983, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a crucial pillar supporting Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. It has withstood multiple regional and global financial crises. As the Hong Kong dollar depreciated, the system’s mechanism of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was repeatedly triggered in April, May, and August. Outflows of funds from the Hong Kong dollar are a normal part of monetary normalization and operations under the Linked Exchange Rate System. To improve public understanding of these operations and the system’s mechanics, the MA actively explains the technical details of the system and demonstrates Hong Kong’s capacity to respond to shocks. The government remains committed to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. Foreign exchange and monetary markets stayed stable, further strengthening public confidence in the government’s commitment and the Hong Kong dollar’s role as a medium of exchange and store of value. During the Fund’s Article IV consultation with Hong Kong in 2018, the IMF reaffirmed its support for the Linked Exchange Rate System, emphasizing its status as the most suitable monetary framework for Hong Kong, serving as the linchpin for stability, supporting ongoing economic growth, maintaining competitiveness, and ensuring the smooth functioning of the large financial services sector.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: Given the critical role of a sound banking system for the normal functioning of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the MA continues to closely monitor banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress testing outcomes, and maintains oversight of banks’ property, enterprise, and mainland-related lending, to ensure the resilience of the banking sector. Banks hold substantial foreign reserves, which can be accessed via the discount window to smooth liquidity management during periods of interest rate volatility. The MA remains prepared to adjust the issuance of foreign reserves certificates and bonds to provide additional liquidity if rapid outflows of funds from the Hong Kong dollar occur. The MA also reminds the public to manage market and interest rate risks prudently and to prepare for potential market fluctuations.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance transparency of the Currency Board account, since October 1998, some foreign exchange fund assets have been designated to support the monetary base. The support ratio (supporting assets relative to the monetary base) fluctuated between 107.8% and 109.9% throughout 2018, without reaching its upper or lower limits. On December 31, 2018, the ratio was 109.9% (see Chart 5). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although certain foreign reserves assets have been designated as supporting assets, all assets in the Foreign Exchange Reserve can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The large fiscal resources of the foreign exchange fund provide a strong cushion to safeguard Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability in the face of sudden shocks.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Committee (CBC), operating under the Foreign Reserve Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2018, topics discussed included the potential impact of multiple countries’ central banks exiting unconventional monetary policies on offshore USD loans in Hong Kong, the interest rate sensitivity of Hong Kong dollar monetary demand, and operational mechanisms and theories since the three major enhancements to the Linked Exchange Rate System. Minutes of CBC meetings and the monetary operations reports submitted to it are accessible on the MA’s website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Research Centre (Research Centre) continued to support research in the fields of monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the Centre has increasingly focused on policy-oriented research, as evidenced by seminars and scholar visits. It collaborates with major central banks and policy research institutions to organize more policy-related seminars. In addition, launched in 2016, the specialized scholar program supports more research projects related to MA policy formulation.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the Centre hosted a total of 16 visiting scholars and published 25 research papers. During the year, it also organized four international conferences:
- The 9th Annual China Economic Conference in January, themed “China’s Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability.” Co-organized by the Research Centre, the Development Research Center of the State Council’s Market Economy Research Institute, and the People’s Bank of China’s Financial Research Institute, focusing on real estate-related issues and risks in Mainland China.
- A September conference on “Exchange Rate and Monetary Policy Framework,” co-hosted by the MA and the Bank for International Settlements. It celebrated the 20th anniversary of the BIS Asia Regional Office in Hong Kong, focusing on the role of exchange rates within monetary policy frameworks.
- The 2018 Annual Seminar on Microstructure of Central Bank Financial Markets in November, discussing theoretical and empirical research on financial market microstructure and recent policy developments.
- A November China experts’ webinar on “A New Era for China’s Economy,” co-hosted with the BIS and the US Federal Reserve. The webinar addressed urgent challenges facing the Mainland economy, its impact on the global economy, and policy issues of interest to central bankers. This was the first time the webinar was held outside Europe.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increasing global economic and financial market uncertainties, Hong Kong's banking system remained sound in 2018. The effectiveness of the liquidity and credit risk management frameworks of authorized institutions continued to be a key supervisory focus for the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) during the year. Given the ongoing rise in cyber threats and the broader use of financial technology in banking, the HKMA enhanced its supervision of technological risk management and business operational resilience for authorized institutions. In May, the HKMA issued a revised "Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks" and began processing applications for virtual bank authorization. Regarding conduct regulation, the HKMA took further measures to strengthen supervision of authorized institutions’ sales practices of investment and insurance products, promote accessible banking services for persons with disabilities, and foster a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crimes become more complex and globalized, the HKMA continues to leverage new technologies and a risk-based approach to strengthen Hong Kong’s capacity to combat money laundering and terrorist financing. Progress in implementing international regulatory standards in Hong Kong has been satisfactory, including standards on capital adequacy, disclosure, liquidity, and large exposure limits. Additionally, the HKMA has strengthened communication with the banking industry to ensure an appropriate balance between supervisory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 金管局的整體目標之一是促進銀行體系的安全及穩定。要達致這個目標，實有賴建立及維持具高度應對能力且能為香港經濟提供所需關鍵金融服務的金融體系。
mt_raw: One of the HKMA's overarching objectives is to promote the safety and stability of the banking system. Achieving this goal relies heavily on building and maintaining a resilient financial system capable of providing critical financial services essential for Hong Kong’s economic stability.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may impact financial stability due to their operational practices or, in extreme cases, by failing in an unorderly manner. As the regulatory authority, the HKMA plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring banks are capable of resisting shocks, responding effectively to crises, and recovering swiftly, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The HKMA is responsible for prudential supervision of banks, including licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions"), as well as some designated financial market infrastructure.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the HKMA cannot guarantee a risk-free financial system, nor is Hong Kong’s prudential supervision system designed for "zero risk." As a resolution authority, the HKMA aims to ensure an orderly resolution process if an authorized institution can no longer sustainably operate. To this end, Hong Kong has established a resolution regime for financial institutions, under which the HKMA acts as the resolution authority for a number of entities, including authorized institutions. Developing a smooth and effective resolution framework in Hong Kong requires the formulation of resolution legislation and policy standards, planning to remove obstacles to resolution, and enhancing the HKMA’s operational capabilities to resolve failing authorized institutions. To execute these tasks effectively, the HKMA adopts internationally consistent and coordinated approaches.

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the HKMA conducted a total of 187 off-site reviews covering a wide range of areas including CAMEL ratings, corporate governance, business operations, and risk management of authorized institutions, as well as their strategies for coping with financial technological developments. To further enhance the risk governance of authorized institutions, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards or board sub-committees of authorized institutions and followed up on the implementation progress of corporate governance guidelines. Additionally, the HKMA held 28 tripartite meetings with authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: Besides off-site reviews, the HKMA continued regular on-site examinations and used thematic assessments to review higher-risk areas. Throughout the year, 392 on-site reviews and thematic assessments were performed, with a continued focus on credit risk management. Other key areas included cyber and operational risk management, as well as anti-money laundering (AML) and counter-terrorist financing (CTF) measures. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic assessments related to liquidity and market risk management, as well as the implementation of the Basel Capital Adequacy Framework. The Special Examination Team conducted on-site reviews of authorized institutions’ securities activities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) operations.

src_raw: 年內金管局加強監管，確保認可機構繼續採取審慎的信用風險管理準則。尤其金管局更主動了解大型企業的背景及結構，從而加強企業信用風險的監察制度。此外，金管局亦進行以主要信用風險管理監控措施為重點的專題評估，例如大型企業貸款的批核準則及風險管理、貸款分類及撥備制度、信用風險管治架構、地產發展商貸款的風險管理、有抵押貸款及保單抵押貸款等。
mt_raw: Throughout the year, the HKMA strengthened supervision to ensure authorized institutions continued to adopt prudent credit risk management practices. Specifically, the HKMA proactively gained insights into the backgrounds and structures of large corporate borrowers, enhancing the supervisory regime for corporate credit risk. src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices hit a historic high in July 2018 but showed signs of easing in the second half of the year. Since October 2009, the HKMA has introduced eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures, which have enhanced Hong Kong banks’ resilience against potential reversals in the local property market. The average loan-to-value ratio (LTV) for new residential mortgages decreased from 64% before the first countercyclical measure in September 2009 to 46% in December 2018. The average repayment-to-income ratio also declined from 41% at the maximum limit introduced in August 2010 to 34% in December 2018 (see Diagram 1).

src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: The banking industry continues to face high technology risks. In 2016, the HKMA launched the "Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework." Phase 1 implementation covers 30 authorized institutions, including all major banks. These institutions have completed three stages of assessment: self-assessment of risk levels, maturity assessment, and, where applicable, cyber threat simulation exercises based on risk information. This evaluation helps authorized institutions identify operational gaps and implement remedial actions to strengthen cyber defenses. Meanwhile, the HKMA has outlined schedules for phases 2 and 3, which will cover the remaining authorized institutions. During the year, on-site examinations focused on cyber security controls, outsourcing arrangements, and IT governance.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to collaborate with the banking industry on seven initiatives announced in September 2017 to promote smart banking and foster fintech development in Hong Kong. In supervisory developments, the HKMA issued a revised "Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks" in May. Additionally, under the "Banking Simplification" measure, regulatory requirements for remote account opening, online lending, and online wealth management have been streamlined. These regulatory enhancements improve the online banking customer experience. In September, the scope of the "Banking Simplification" initiative was expanded to promote the adoption of RegTech, with three new focal points: AML and CTF monitoring technologies, RegTech for prudent risk management and compliance, and "machine-readable" regulatory requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國貨幣政策持續正常化，金管局加強了流動性風險的監管，以確保認可機構審慎及有效地管理其流動性風險。年內金管局進行了一輪專題評估，以評估認可機構為美元流動性可能收緊所作的準備，以及其內部流動性壓力測試的能力。此外，金管局亦監察認可機構遵守於1月生效的「穩定資金淨額比率」要求的情況。
mt_raw: As U.S. monetary policy continues normalization, the HKMA has strengthened liquidity risk supervision to ensure authorized institutions prudently and effectively manage their liquidity risks. The HKMA also monitored compliance with the "Net Stable Funding Ratio" requirement that took effect in January 2018.

src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The government released the "Hong Kong Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment Report" in April, which identified high AML/CTF threats facing the Hong Kong banking system, reflecting the increasingly globalized and complex nature of financial services. The threats include not only local criminal activities but also external sources such as illicit proceeds from overseas corruption, scam activities by transnational criminal groups, tax evasion, and risks related to Hong Kong’s role as a payment and trading hub subject to sanctions. Under the HKMA’s support, the government issued a policy statement on AML/CTF efforts, outlining responses to these threats. Its aim is to strengthen the AML/CTF system while attracting and facilitating legitimate business activities.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The "Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Amendment) Ordinance 2018," which took effect on March 1, introduced revisions including flexibility in customer due diligence procedures to support authorized institutions’ use of technology for customer onboarding. The amendments also broadened the scope to require lawyers, accountants, estate agents, and trust or corporate service providers to bear AML/CTF responsibilities, further strengthening the system. These amendments, together with updates to the Companies Ordinance aimed at increasing transparency of beneficial ownership, assist authorized institutions in fulfilling AML/CTF obligations.

src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: As the connectivity measures between Mainland China and Hong Kong’s capital markets advance, Hong Kong’s unique role as a gateway into Mainland China is further solidified. “Bond Connect” has fully adopted real-time Delivery vs. Payment (DvP) settlement and the State Council announced tax exemptions for overseas investors investing in China’s domestic bond market, further enhancing efficiency and attractiveness. The HKMA works closely with mainland authorities to explore and implement numerous financial infrastructure measures that facilitate personal and corporate participation in the GBA. Hong Kong’s offshore RenminbiBusiness continues to flourish, with RMB deposits increasing by 6% year-on-year to HKD 657.7 billion; the RTGS system for RMB payments averages daily transactions valued at RMB 101.01 billion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The HKMA actively explores new opportunities to further enhance Hong Kong’s financial platform competitiveness. To develop the bond market, the HKMA implements the “Bond Initiatives” as proposed in the Fiscal Budget, providing funding support for issuers debuting bonds in Hong Kong, and collaborates closely with the government to revise regulations, expanding the scope of taxable income under the “Qualifying Debt Instrument” scheme. The HKMA also boosts market promotion activities to showcase Hong Kong’s advantages to overseas and mainland stakeholders, including organising large-scale and thematic outreach activities to promote Hong Kong as a hub for green finance, infrastructure funding, and corporate treasury functions.

mt_raw: On the international front, the HKMA leads multiple regional and international committees. src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The secure and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for its status as an international financial centre. Four RTGS systems for interbank transactions, the Central Clearing System (CCS) for debt instruments, and the Hong Kong Trade Data Repository (HKTR) achieved 100% system availability in 2018, exceeding the target of 99.95%. The CCS, via accounts in two Mainland China central securities depositories, continues to facilitate bond connect northbound settlement and holds Mainland bonds for relevant CCS members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To promote the overall safety and efficiency of retail payment services, the HKMA designated two additional retail payment systems under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (“Ordinance”) in August, bringing the total to six retail payment systems under regulation. The HKMA also regulates 16 stored value facility licensees, whose active promotion of new products and services offers customers more choices and better user experiences. Concurrently, electronic cheques, e-bills, and payment services are further expanded to include cross-border transactions between Hong Kong and the entire Guangdong Province.

mt_raw: In the same month, the HKMA also launched the HKQR – Hong Kong’s common retail QR code standard and associated mobile app, the “Hong Kong Common QR Code” (HKQR). src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: Open APIs refer to sharing banking data with third-party service providers to enable more seamless integration of banking and other sector services. Users can enjoy comprehensive services securely through a single system. To promote banking industry R&D and provision of open APIs, the HKMA issued the Open API Framework in July, adopting a risk-based approach and phased implementation across four stages. As of end-January 2019, 20 banks had opened around 500 APIs in phase one, covering data for over 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: Building on the proof-of-concept results of the HKMA-led Trade Finance Digitalisation initiative, an alliance of multiple Hong Kong banks launched the “TradeConnect” platform in October, based on Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT). The platform aims to reduce errors and fraud risks by digitising trade documents and automating trade finance workflows. By the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined as members. “TradeConnect” also signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Europe’s “we.trade” platform to connect the two platforms for joint proof-of-concept testing. The HKMA is also exploring opportunities to connect “TradeConnect” with other regions, including collaborating with the Monetary Authority of Singapore on a “Global Trade Connectivity Network.”

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a difficult year for investors, as the investment environment was troubled by multiple risk factors, including the sustained normalization of US interest rates leading to tightening financial conditions, escalating trade disputes among major economies, and rising populism and geopolitical risks worldwide. Global stock markets generally declined, and US Treasury yields rose following four rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. The US dollar strengthened as US interest rates increased. Some emerging markets faced severe domestic political and economic pressures, leading to significant currency devaluations. Despite these challenging conditions, the Foreign Exchange Fund recorded investment income of HKD 10.9 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: The Fund is broadly divided into two main portfolios: the support portfolio and the investment portfolio. The support portfolio holds highly liquid US dollar assets, providing full support for the monetary base in accordance with the currency issuance system. The investment portfolio mainly invests in bonds and equities of OECD member countries to preserve the value and long-term purchasing power of the assets.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has prudently and gradually diversified part of the Fund’s assets into a wider range of asset classes, including emerging markets, Mainland Chinese bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Exposure to emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities is held within the investment portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held within the long-term growth portfolio. The long-term growth portfolio’s market value cap is set at one-third of the cumulative surplus of the Fund and the total of deposits attributed to the Fund’s subsidiaries linked to the long-term growth portfolio.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: Investment procedures are based on strategic and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation reflects the long-term target allocation to meet investment objectives, serving as a benchmark. The Fund adopts a tactical approach to asset allocation to seek returns above the benchmark, leading to deviations from the benchmark known as “strategic deviations.” After consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, the Financial Secretary sets the investment benchmarks and allowable tracking error limits. The HKMA is authorized to determine strategic asset allocation and establish permissible ranges for strategic deviations. Portfolio managers can take advantage of short-term market movements within these ranges.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA advocates responsible investment. For example, it has adopted the Principles for Responsible Ownership issued by the Securities and Futures Commission. These principles help investors determine the best way to discharge ownership responsibilities when investing in Hong Kong-listed companies. Regarding the Fund’s management, internal guidelines on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors have been established, applicable to the selection, appointment, and supervision of external managers. External managers responsible for active management of Hong Kong equities are required to adhere to these Principles. Overall, ESG considerations are integrated into the Fund’s investment and monitoring processes. The HKMA keeps abreast of developments in ESG standards and assesses ways to further incorporate them. To promote international cooperation on responsible investment, the HKMA is a member of FCLTGlobal, a non-profit organization dedicated to long-term, value-driven business and investment decisions.

src_raw: 在2018年，原先被市場低估的多項風險因素一一浮現，包括美國利率正常化的步伐、美國政府外貿政策和保護主義對全球貿易的衝擊，以及地緣政治的風險，環球金融市場因而出現大幅波動及調整。
mt_raw: 2018 was a difficult year for investors, as the investment environment was troubled by multiple risk factors, including the sustained normalization of US interest rates leading to tightening financial conditions, escalating trade disputes among major economies, and rising populism and geopolitical risks worldwide. Global stock markets generally declined, and US Treasury yields rose following four rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. The US dollar strengthened as US interest rates increased. Some emerging markets faced severe domestic political and economic pressures, leading to significant currency devaluations. Despite these challenging conditions, the Foreign Exchange Fund recorded investment income of HKD 10.9 billion in 2018.

mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) maintains effective communication with society and markets through media, its website, public education activities, and various channels to enhance public understanding of its policies and operations. src_raw: 金管局與傳媒保持緊密聯繫，以提高金管局的透明度，並增進公眾對其政策及工作的了解。金管局在2018年共舉辦96次公開媒體活動，包括21次新聞發布會、11次即場訪問及64次其他公開活動。此外，年內安排了39次媒體訪談，並發布462份雙語新聞稿，每日亦處理大量傳媒查詢。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains close ties with the media to improve transparency and deepen public understanding of its policies and work. In 2018, the HKMA organized a total of 96 public media events, including 21 press conferences, 11 on-site interviews, and 64 other public activities. Additionally, 39 media interviews were arranged during the year, and 462 bilingual press releases were issued. The media also submitted a large number of inquiries daily.

src_raw: 為增進社會對金管局主要職能的認識，金管局為本地及海外媒體舉辦傳媒簡報會及工作坊，內容涵蓋多個不同題材，包括聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）、金融科技發展、綠色金融及基建融資。除了豐富現有的YouTube頻道及LinkedIn專頁的內容，金管局亦在7月推出官方Facebook專頁，進一步利用社交媒體加強與公眾溝通。
mt_raw: To enhance societal awareness of the HKMA’s main functions, the HKMA held media briefings and workshops for local and overseas media, covering topics such as the Linked Exchange Rate system, financial technology development, green finance, and infrastructure financing. Besides enriching content on its YouTube channel and LinkedIn page, the HKMA launched an official Facebook page in July to further utilize social media for better communication with the public.

mt_raw: In addition to the HKMA’s Annual Report, in 2018 the HKMA published two issues of the “Mid-year Monetary and Financial Stability Review” and four issues of the Quarterly Bulletin. Furthermore, the HKMA issued 13 articles in its "Hindsight" series, explaining various topics related to its work.

src_raw: 金管局的機構網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)提供超過6萬頁英文及繁簡字體中文版資料，方便公眾查閱金管局的最新資訊。網站另載有根據《銀行業條例》第20條備存的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」和「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，以及根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》備存的「儲值支付工具持牌人紀錄冊」。網站特設專題網頁及突出的快速連結，提醒公眾注意金管局的新措施，例如「轉數快」，以及重要及適時事項，例如提防電話騙案及硬幣收集計劃下收銀車停泊的位置。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s institutional website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in both English and traditional Chinese, making it easy for the public to access the latest information about the HKMA. The website also features records of “Recognized Institutions and Local Representative Offices” filed under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, and “Records of Securities Staff of Recognized Institutions,” as well as records of “Licensed Stored Value Facility Providers” filed under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facility Ordinance. The website includes dedicated thematic pages and prominent quick links to alert the public to new measures such as “FPS” and important timely topics like phone scam prevention and the coin collection program’s parking locations.

src_raw: 為推動銀行業落實開放應用程式介面(API)，金管局身體力行，7月開始在其網站提供開放API，方便公眾取用金管局的重要資訊。首批50組開放API形式資料在7月順利推出，涵蓋市民最常查閱的範疇，例如銀行體系及外匯基金的統計數據，以及新聞稿與收銀車日程表等。餘下的80組資料將於2019年中前分階段推出。為進一步方便公眾在網站查閱有關金管局的最新消息及資訊，金管局正全面修訂網站的設計及內容，使其更方便易用。全新設計的網站預期將於2019年內推出。
mt_raw: To promote the implementation of open APIs in banking, the HKMA introduced open APIs on its website in July, facilitating public access to key information. The initial release included 50 datasets in API format, covering popular topics such as banking system and Exchange Fund statistics, press releases, and the cash vehicle schedule. The remaining 80 datasets are scheduled to be rolled out gradually by mid-2019. To further enhance public access to the latest news and information about the HKMA, the website is undergoing a comprehensive redesign to improve usability and content clarity, with the new site expected to launch within 2019.

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分，每星期6天開放予公眾參觀使用。展覽館介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備閱讀資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。
mt_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of the International Finance Centre 2, introduces the HKMA’s work and increases public understanding of monetary and banking affairs. The Centre consists of an exhibition hall and a library, both open six days a week. The exhibition hall covers the HKMA’s functions as well as the development of Hong Kong’s currency and banking sector; it also offers reading materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong’s monetary system, banking, and finance.

src_raw: 資訊中心的貨幣展區介紹香港紙幣與硬幣的設計、防偽特徵、製作過程及其他趣味知識。該展區在2018年第1季展開翻新工程，加入多項互動元素，例如寓學習於玩樂的遊戲，使訪客對香港貨幣有所認識之餘，更可樂在其中。此外，貨幣展區新增一棵藝術紫荊樹，是由2,018顆以不再適合流通並已切碎鈔票為媒材製成的透明立方塊拼綴而成，與展區內另一幅以香港硬幣為媒材砌成的馬賽克作品相映成趣。全新形象的貨幣展區於8月16日重新開放。
mt_raw: The currency exhibition area within the Centre showcases the design, anti-counterfeiting features, production process, and interesting facts about Hong Kong banknotes and coins. Renovation work commenced in the first quarter of 2018, adding interactive elements such as educational games that make learning fun for visitors. A newly added artful camellia tree, made of 2,018 discarded and shredded banknotes encased in transparent cubes, is displayed alongside a mosaic made of Hong Kong coins, creating an engaging visual. The renovated currency exhibition was reopened on August 16.

src_raw: 資訊中心為訪客提供導賞服務。年內資訊中心接待超過59,000名訪客，並為學校及其他團體提供580多次導賞服務（圖3）。資訊中心自2003年12月啟用以來累計接待的訪客總數超過705,000人次。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏26,000多種書籍、期刊及其他刊物，以供研究香港貨幣、銀行業、金融與中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦備存《銀行業條例》第20條規定的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」。
mt_raw: The Centre offers guided tours. During the year, it welcomed over 59,000 visitors and provided more than 580 guided tours for schools and groups (see Figure 3). Since its opening in December 2003, the Centre has served over 705,000 visitors. The library adjacent to the exhibition hall stocks over 26,000 books, journals, and other publications for research on Hong Kong’s monetary system, banking, finance, and central banking. It also maintains the “Records of Recognized Institutions and Local Representative Offices” and “Records of Securities Staff of Recognized Institutions” as required by Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance.

src_raw: 為與社區保持聯繫及增進市民對金管局工作的認識，金管局在2018年共舉辦3場公眾教育講座，吸引約1,500名中學生及教師參加，主題包括聯匯制度、香港鈔票、銀行體系穩定、存款保障計劃、「轉數快」、儲值支付工具、金融科技、消費者保障及金融業就業資訊等。教育講座自1998年推出以來，已有接近6萬名師生參與。
mt_raw: To maintain community ties and increase awareness of the HKMA’s work, in 2018 the HKMA organized three public education lectures, attracting about 1,500 students and teachers. Topics covered include the linked exchange rate system, Hong Kong banknotes, banking stability, deposit protection scheme, FPS, stored value facilities, financial technology, consumer protection, and employment opportunities in the financial sector. Since its inception in 1998, nearly 60,000 teachers and students have participated.

src_raw: 財政司司長透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的意見，並參考市場薪酬水平及做法，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬組合包括現金薪酬及公積金，另設一些基本福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（即基本薪酬）及根據員工工作表現每年一次過發放的浮動薪酬。

The compensation package includes cash salary and MPF contributions, along with basic benefits. Cash remuneration comprises a fixed monthly salary (the basic salary) and an annual performance-based variable component paid once a year.

src_raw: 財政司司長每年檢討金管局員工薪酬時，會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的建議，並考慮管治委員會對金管局過去一年的表現評估、獨立人力資源顧問公司進行的金融業薪酬調查結果，以及其他相關因素。個別工作表現優秀的員工的薪酬亦可能獲得特別調整，以保持其薪酬競爭力。
mt_raw: When reviewing HKMA staff pay annually, the Financial Secretary consults the governing committee under its jurisdiction through the Foreign Reserves Consultative Committee and considers the governing committee’s performance assessment of the HKMA over the past year, results of salary surveys conducted by independent HR consultants, and other relevant factors. High-performing employees may receive special salary adjustments to maintain competitive remuneration.

terms: {'主管': 'Division Head', '助理總裁': 'executive director', '固定薪酬': 'fixed pay', '浮動薪酬': 'variable pay', '總裁': 'Chief Executive', '薪酬': 'remuneration', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，並按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: Based on individual performance, the HKMA allocates funds approved for fixed salary adjustments and variable pay increases; the variable component for investment-responsible staff aims to link performance with remuneration. Adjustments to fixed salaries and the issuance of variable pay for senior staff (Assistant General Manager and above) are approved by the Financial Secretary, after consulting the governing committee, with relevant employees abstaining during discussions on their own remuneration proposals. Fixed salary adjustments and variable pay for managerial and subordinate staff are determined by the HKMA’s Chief Executive under delegated authority from the Financial Secretary, based on the total approved amount designated for remuneration payments.

src_raw: 集團的投資物業按公平值列帳，於2018年12月31日共值253.21億港元。集團亦於3間聯營公司及20間合營公司擁有權益，該等公司主要業務為持有海外投資物業，有關權益共值443.36億港元。不論是由集團直接持有或由聯營公司或合營公司持有，該等投資物業的公平值均主要根據獨立專業估值師的估值釐定。該等估值涉及重大判斷及估計，包括所用的估值方法及假設。
mt_raw: As of December 31, 2018, the Group’s investment properties at fair value were valued at HKD 25.321 billion. The Group also holds interests in three associates and twenty joint ventures, primarily involved in holding overseas investment properties, with interests totaling HKD 44.336 billion. Whether held directly by the Group or through associates or joint ventures, the fair value of these investment properties is mainly determined based on valuations provided by independent professional valuers. src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether caused by fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Hong Kong Standards on Auditing will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. A misstatement is considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, it could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of the financial statements.

terms: {'審計憑證': 'audit evidence', '財務報表': 'financial statements'}
src_raw:
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。
